papers.title: Deficits in saccade inhibition in children with attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder
papers.abstract_snippet: This study examined saccade inhibition deficits in children with ADHD using antisaccade and prosaccade tasks, finding significantly higher error rates in the ADHD group.

papers.title: Antisaccade performance in ADHD: a systematic review and meta-analysis
papers.abstract_snippet: A meta-analysis of antisaccade performance in ADHD, demonstrating robust deficits in saccade inhibition with large effect sizes across multiple studies.

papers.title: Saccadic eye movements in children with attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder: a systematic review
papers.abstract_snippet: This systematic review examines saccadic eye movement abnormalities in children with ADHD, highlighting consistent impairments in saccade latency and accuracy.

papers.title: Proactive and reactive saccade inhibition in ADHD: a systematic review and meta-analysis
papers.abstract_snippet: A meta-analytic review examining proactive and reactive saccade inhibition mechanisms in ADHD across antisaccade and stop-signal paradigms.
